description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult pedestrian, depicted in a dynamic walking pose with one leg extended forward and the arms slightly bent. The figure is dressed in fitted, modern urban attire, including a jacket and long pants, with the clothing closely following the contours of the body. The head is slightly tilted, and the overall body posture suggests purposeful movement, as if crossing a street or walking along a sidewalk. The proportions and anatomical details are realistic, with visible separation between limbs and a natural stride. The surface of the figure appears matte and uniform, with no visible accessories or carried items. The asset is solid and opaque, with no visible openings or interactive components.
description: A realistic adult pedestrian in a walking pose, wearing modern fitted clothing and depicted with natural body proportions and stride.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the forward stride, bent arms, and clear definition of the jacket and pants.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the extended leg and the profile of the head and torso.
description_view_2: Rear-left view displaying the back of the jacket, the trailing leg, and the overall walking posture.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back, both legs, and the symmetrical arm swing.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted jacket and long pants, modern urban style
attribute_posture: walking with one leg forward and arms bent
attribute_hairstyle: short hair, close to the head
